document_metadata.first_words: # Liberal Democrat conference: Clegg and coalition survey Only a third of Lib Dem candidates for the general election have said they want Nick Clegg's photo on their election literature, a BBC survey has found. Liberal Democrat Parliamentary candidates were polled by the Sunday Politics and ComRes on party priorities, with Eleanor Garnier reporting from a marginal North Yorkshire seat on the result. That survey also showed that 44% backed a future coalition with Labour, with 14% wanting to carry on with the Conservatives. Sunday Politics interview: Andrew Neil and David Laws on survey result More: Follow @daily_politics on Twitter, external like us on Facebook, external andwatch a recent clip andwatch full programmes on iPlayer and

# Liberal Democrat conference: Clegg and coalition survey

## To play this video you need to enable JavaScript in your browser.

This video can not be played

Liberal Democrat conference: Clegg and coalition surveyClose

Only a third of Lib Dem candidates for the general election have said they want Nick Clegg's photo on their election literature, a BBC survey has found.

Liberal Democrat Parliamentary candidates were polled by the Sunday Politics and ComRes on party priorities, with Eleanor Garnier reporting from a marginal North Yorkshire seat on the result.

That survey also showed that 44% backed a future coalition with Labour, with 14% wanting to carry on with the Conservatives.

[Sunday Politics interview: Andrew Neil and David Laws on survey result](/news/uk-politics-29505653)
